case_title: CCSF: DEPT OF SOCIAL SERVICES VS ROGERS, GLADYS ANTOINETTE

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF: DEPT OF SOCIAL SERVICES
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF: DEPT OF SOCIAL SERVICES PETITION MAILED ON MAY 08, 1997

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF: DEPT OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROGERS, GLADYS ANTOINETTE $2,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,491.00, PER STIPULATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, GLADYS ANTOINETTE
